stemHtml: Following a take-off calculation, a range of decision speeds is found to be available with a maximum V1 of 150 kt and a minimum V1 of 142 kt. In the event of an engine failure after the chosen V1, which of the following statements would be correct?

options.a: Using a V<sub>1</sub> of 150 kt compared to 142 kt will reduce the take-off distance and leave the climb performance unchanged.
options.b: Using a V<sub>1</sub> of 142 kt compared to 150 kt will reduce the take-off distance and leave the climb performance unchanged.
options.c: Using a V<sub>1</sub> of 142 kt compared to 150 kt will reduce the take-off distance and degrade the climb performance.
options.d: Using a V<sub>1</sub> of 150 kt compared to 142 kt will reduce the take-off distance and improve the climb performance.
